commotion.def: 騷動、動亂、喧鬧的人物 (單數)
commotion.ex: There was a sudden commotion in the local street.

communal.def: 公共的、公社的的人的人物
communal.ex: They shared a communal kitchen in the apartment.

commune.def: 公社、密切談心、交談的人的人
commune.ex: She went to the forest to commune with nature tonight.

communicable.def: 可傳達的、傳染性的人的人物 (單數)
communicable.ex: Influenza is a highly communicable disease today.

communicant.def: 領聖餐者、提供消息的人人物 (單數)
communicant.ex: He is a regular communicant at the local church.

communicate.def: 傳達、溝通、傳播的人的人
communicate.ex: It's important to communicate your ideas clearly.

communication.def: 溝通、傳達、通訊的人物 (單數)
communication.col: mass communication, visual communication, satellite communication
communication.ex: Satellite communication is vital for the modern world.

communicative.def: 愛說話的、溝通的人的人物
communicative.ex: The suspect was not very communicative with police.

communion.def: 聖餐、共融、信仰團體人物 (單數)
communion.ex: The family took their first Holy Communion today.

communique/communiqué.def: 公報、官方報導人物 (單數)
communique/communiqué.ex: The leaders issued a joint communique after meeting.

communism.ex: The rise of communism changed the entire region.

communist.def: 共產主義者的人物 (單數)
communist.ex: The local communist party held its annual meeting.

community.def: 社區、共同體、社會的人物 (單數)
community.col: sense of community, ethnic community, business community
community.ex: The local community worked together for the park.

commutable.def: 可交換的、(法)可減刑的的人的人物
commutable.ex: The death sentence was commutable to life prison.

commutation.def: 交換、變更、減刑的人物 (單數)
commutation.ex: The prisoner begged for a commutation of sentence.

commutator.ex: The small motor commutator was worn and noisy.

commute.def: 通勤、減刑、交換、代償的人的人
commute.ex: Many people commute to the big city every morning.

commuter.ex: The regular commuter train was late again today.

compact.def: 緊湊的、精簡的、合約、粉盒的人的人的人物
compact.col: compact car, compact disc (CD), signed compact
compact.ex: She has a very small and compact car for driving.

compactly.ex: The boxes were packed compactly into the truck.

compactness.ex: The relative compactness of the tool is useful.

companion.def: 夥伴、同伴、手冊、使成雙的人的人人物 (單數)
companion.col: constant companion, travel companion, lady's companion
companion.ex: My loyal dog has been my constant companion for years.

companionable.ex: They sat in a very warm and companionable silence.

companionship.def: 夥伴關係、交情的人物 (單數)
companionship.ex: Many old people need companionship in their life.

company.def: 公司、陪伴、群體的人物 (單數)
company.col: keep company, in company with, limited company (Ltd)
company.ex: She works for a large international tech company.

comparable.def: 可比較的、比得上的的人的人物 (平)
comparable.ex: This local wine is of a truly comparable quality.

comparatively.ex: The house was comparatively small for the family.

compare.def: 比較、對照、比作、相比的人的人
compare.col: compare notes, beyond compare, compare with
compare.ex: You cannot compare these two different situations.

comparison.def: 比較、對照、比喻的人物 (單數)
comparison.ex: There is no scale of comparison between the two.

compartment.def: 隔間、車廂、區塊人物 (單數)
compartment.ex: He put the map into the car's glove compartment.

compartmentalize.ex: He managed to compartmentalize his busy work life.
